ddls:
CREATE TABLE "financial_periods" (
  "period_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each financial period */,
  "month" TEXT /* Month of the financial period */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the financial period */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the financial period */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the financial period */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the financial period (e.g., open, closed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("period_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "balances" (
  "balance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each balance entry */,
  "period_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the financial period */,
  "previous_month_balance" REAL /* Balance carried over from the previous month */,
  "available_cash" REAL /* Available cash at the beginning of the period */,
  "additional_income" REAL /* Additional income received during the period */,
  "total_income" REAL /* Total income for the period */,
  "total_expenses" REAL /* Total expenses for the period */,
  "net_balance" REAL /* Net balance at the end of the period */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the balance entry was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the balance entry */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Any additional notes or comments about the balance */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("balance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_balances_period_id FOREIGN KEY ("period_id") REFERENCES financial_periods ("period_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "income_sources" (
  "income_source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each income source */,
  "source_name" TEXT /* Name of the income source */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the income source */,
  "is_recurring" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the income source is recurring */,
  "frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of the recurring income (e.g., monthly, quarterly) */,
  "expected_amount" REAL /* Expected amount of income from this source */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("income_source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "income_transactions" (
  "transaction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each income transaction */,
  "period_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the financial period */,
  "income_source_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the income source */,
  "amount" REAL /* Amount of income received */,
  "transaction_date" TEXT /* Date of the transaction */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the income transaction */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the transaction was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the transaction */,
  "source_document" TEXT /* Reference to the source document (e.g., invoice, receipt) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("transaction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_income_transactions_income_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("income_source_id") REFERENCES income_sources ("income_source_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_income_transactions_period_id FOREIGN KEY ("period_id") REFERENCES financial_periods ("period_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "expense_categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each expense category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the expense category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the expense category */,
  "is_recurring" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the expense category is recurring */,
  "frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of the recurring expense (e.g., monthly, quarterly) */,
  "expected_amount" REAL /* Expected amount of expense for this category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "expense_transactions" (
  "transaction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each expense transaction */,
  "period_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the financial period */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the expense category */,
  "amount" REAL /* Amount of the expense */,
  "transaction_date" TEXT /* Date of the transaction */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the expense transaction */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the transaction was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the transaction */,
  "source_document" TEXT /* Reference to the source document (e.g., invoice, receipt) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("transaction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_expense_transactions_period_id FOREIGN KEY ("period_id") REFERENCES financial_periods ("period_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_expense_transactions_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES expense_categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "budget_plans" (
  "plan_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each budget plan */,
  "period_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the financial period */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the expense category */,
  "planned_amount" REAL /* Planned amount for the category */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the budget plan was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the budget plan */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Any additional notes or comments about the budget plan */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("plan_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_budget_plans_period_id FOREIGN KEY ("period_id") REFERENCES financial_periods ("period_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_budget_plans_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES expense_categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "financial_goals" (
  "goal_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each financial goal */,
  "goal_name" TEXT /* Name of the financial goal */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the financial goal */,
  "target_amount" REAL /* Target amount for the goal */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the goal */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the goal */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the goal (e.g., active, completed) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the goal was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the goal */,
  "progress" REAL /* Current progress towards the goal */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("goal_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., financial analyst, manager, admin) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the user was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the user */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for the user */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the user account is active */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the access log was created */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access occurred */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used to access the system */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "financial_forecasts" (
  "forecast_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each financial forecast */,
  "forecast_name" TEXT /* Name of the financial forecast */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the financial forecast */,
  "forecast_date" TEXT /* Date of the forecast */,
  "forecast_amount" REAL /* Forecasted amount */,
  "actual_amount" REAL /* Actual amount */,
  "variance" REAL /* Variance between forecasted and actual amounts */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the forecast was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the forecast */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Any additional notes or comments about the forecast */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("forecast_id")
)
